content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 offers "1 week of Premium free" in exchange for leaving a 5-star review, a direct quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits rewarding or incentivizing users for leaving reviews (2.3.9/5.6.3), since it manipulates App Store ratings integrity, and this text is a textbook example. Remove the "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" line entirely, and if you want to prompt reviews, use SKStoreReviewController's native API without any reward attached.
